_source: OmniClass Table 11 — Construction Entities by Function (verbatim from primary mirror declared in sprint-Z-source-provenance.md §2; 2012 DRAFT modified 2013-02-26 NBIMS-US V3 2.4.4.1, published 2015 by NIBS buildingSMART alliance, ©CSI and Construction Specifications Canada)
_note: Building-level taxonomy. Each entry represents a WHOLE BUILDING TYPE (single-family residence / hotel / office building / warehouse) used as cross-reference rollup target from Uniclass SL room-level entries via building_type_codes[] field (back-filled at Z.D.1). T11 access via the NIBS V3 2.4.4.1 PDF returned fully extractable layout-preserving text at access date (pdftotext -layout), contrary to the Z.A.0 §2 worst-case projection (40-60% verbatim coverage) — the primary NIBS PDF yielded ~100% verbatim transcription for the codes selected. Of 748 leaf codes in the source PDF, 89 representative codes are transcribed here, exceeding the ~70-entry target while covering all 12 conceptual top-level classes (residential / commercial / industrial / mixed-use / transportation / educational / recreation / healthcare / civic / religious / cultural / agricultural) plus T11-specific infrastructure classes (water / energy / waste / information). All 89 entries are mirror_sourced verbatim from the NIBS PDF; zero inferred entries because the PDF was readable end-to-end. Coverage SCOPE is selective (89 of 748 PDF leaves) but transcription FIDELITY of selected entries is 100% verbatim. Per Z.A.0 §2 disclosure: Sprint Y will back-fill _verification_status=occs_verified when CSI licensed source available. cross_references stay null per Sprint Z deferral; building_type_codes lookup from SL room entries is the consumption pattern.
